log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Half-Elf — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:14+9=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Half-Elf — Armored Escapist (HP 59 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Half-Elf — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:8+9=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Half-Elf — Armored Escapist. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Half-Elf — Armored Escapist.
→ Half-Elf — Armored Escapist: CON save [d20:3+3=6 vs DC 20] FAIL! 20 necrotic damage. HP: 39/59
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Half-Elf — Armored Escapist --- HP: 39/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:1+9=10 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:1+9=10 vs DC 15] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Half-Elf — Armored Escapist --- HP: 39/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:11+9=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 5 ══
--- Half-Elf — Armored Escapist --- HP: 39/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person

ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:14+9=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.

ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.

→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
